evals.prompt: I'm building a product search feature using Azure AI Search. My index has these fields: id (key), name (searchable), description (searchable), category (filterable, facetable), price (filterable, sortable), and a 1536-dim vector field called 'embedding'. Write a Python function that does hybrid search: combines keyword search with vector similarity. The function should accept a query string and a pre-computed query embedding, filter to a specific category, return the top 10 results with name/price/category fields, and show me how to read the search scores.
evals.expected_output: Uses SearchClient with search_text + vector_queries (VectorizedQuery with list[float] vector, k_nearest_neighbors, fields='embedding'); passes filter= for category; select=['name','price','category']; top=10; iterates results accessing @search.score; VectorizedQuery fields param is the field name string not a list

assertions.text: VectorizedQuery with vector as list[float] and fields='embedding' (string field name)
Both search_text and vector_queries used together (hybrid search, not pure vector)

evals.prompt: Create a complete Python script to set up an Azure AI Search index for a document library. The index needs: id (key), title (searchable, sortable), content (searchable), author (filterable, facetable), created_date (filterable, sortable), and a 3072-dimensional vector field 'content_embedding' for semantic search. Also configure semantic search with title as the title field and content as the content field. Show how to create the index, then upload 3 sample documents including their embeddings.
evals.expected_output: Uses SearchIndexClient.create_or_update_index with SearchIndex; SearchField for vector with vector_search_dimensions=3072 and vector_search_profile_name; VectorSearch with HnswAlgorithmConfiguration and VectorSearchProfile; SemanticSearch with SemanticConfiguration and SemanticPrioritizedFields; exactly one key=True field; uploads documents with merge_or_upload_documents with embedding as list[float]

assertions.text: SearchField for vector with vector_search_dimensions=3072 and vector_search_profile_name
VectorSearch with HnswAlgorithmConfiguration and VectorSearchProfile linking them
SemanticSearch with SemanticConfiguration, SemanticPrioritizedFields, title and content fields
Documents uploaded with content_embedding as list[float], not string or JSON

evals.prompt: Show me how to do semantic search with Azure AI Search in Python. My index 'knowledge-base' already exists with a semantic configuration called 'default'. I want to search for 'best practices for container security' and get the top 5 results with semantic captions and the top answer extracted from the results. Also explain what @search.reranker_score means versus @search.score.
evals.expected_output: Uses query_type='semantic' and semantic_configuration_name='default'; query_caption='extractive'; query_answer='extractive'; accesses @search.captions on results and results.get_answers(); explains @search.score is BM25/vector score while @search.reranker_score is semantic reranking score (0-4 scale)

assertions.text: Accesses @search.captions on results and/or calls results.get_answers()
